ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening stock price for the day */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest stock price for the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest stock price for the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing stock price for the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the day */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The stock exchange where the data was collected */,
  "time" TEXT /* The exact time of the price data (e.g., intra-day) */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* The adjusted closing price, accounting for corporate actions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., finance, technology) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., banking, software) */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's initial public offering (IPO) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the index (e.g., DAX 30, FTSE 100) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the index */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the index is denominated */,
  "base_date" TEXT /* Base date of the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_components" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the index */,
  "inclusion_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was included in the index */,
  "exclusion_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was excluded from the index, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the portfolio was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_components" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, executive) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the day */,
  "order_book" TEXT /* Order book data (e.g., bid-ask spreads, market depth) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., exchange A, exchange B) */,
  "time" TEXT /* The exact time of the market data (e.g., intra-day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., Reuters, Bloomberg) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article for easy access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst rating */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., Buy, Sell, Hold) */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation made by the analyst */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analyst rating */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the rating (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., firm A, firm B) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Firm employing the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analyst's profile was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the analyst's profile was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price target */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Price target set by the analyst */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price target */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the price target */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_targets_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_targets_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)
